name_cn:
Medium genuine quality
[CL] Upgraded Luggage Micro Smile bag, made of imported grain calfskin / leather handle, 1 zipper closure, 1 external zipper pocket on the front. Handheld, zippered closure, internal zipper pocket and double-layer flat pocket on the front, external flat pocket, replaceable strap 12cm long, 4 protective studs at the bottom. Simple lines and texture coexist, cute and Q style makes it sought after by many bloggers and celebrities, color-block/solid color can better present the smile! Model: CL167793, Dimensions: 26.5+25.5+15【Includes original gift box🎁】
